title: Samsung-backed AI chip firm Rebellions targets IPO in South Korea next year, CEO tells CNBC
summary_full: Sunghyun Park, CEO of Rebellions, told CNBC that the company is leaning toward a listing on the KOSPI over the KOSDAQ.
summary_public: Sunghyun Park, CEO of Rebellions, told CNBC that the company is leaning toward a listing on the KOSPI over the KOSDAQ.
